To realize this, we first theoretically mitigate the representation collapse of degenerate bisimulation metrics under sparse rewards by internally introducing a simple but effective predicted reward differential. Building on this robust metric, we design potential-based exploration bonuses, which measure the relative novelty of adjacent observations over the latent space. Extensive experiments on MetaWorld and Maze2D show that TEB achieves superior exploration ability and outperforms recent baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces Task-aware Exploration via a predictive Bisimulation metric (TEB) to improve exploration in visual reinforcement learning with sparse rewards, mitigating representation collapse and outperforming baselines in MetaWorld and Maze2D.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为TEB（Task-aware Exploration via a predictive Bisimulation metric）的任务感知探索方法，旨在改善稀疏奖励下视觉强化学习中的探索，通过缓解表征坍塌并在MetaWorld和Maze2D环境中优于基线方法。
summary_zh: 在稀疏奖励下加速视觉强化学习中的探索仍然具有挑战性，这主要是由于大量与任务无关的变异。尽管在内在探索方面取得了进展，但许多方法要么假设可以访问低维状态，要么缺乏任务感知的探索策略，因此在视觉领域中显得脆弱。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了一种任务感知探索方法TEB，它通过预测的双向模拟度量将任务相关的表示与探索紧密结合。具体来说，TEB不仅利用该度量来学习行为上可靠的任务表示，而且还测量在学习到的潜在空间中的行为内在的新颖性。为了实现这一点，我们首先通过内部引入一个简单但有效的预测奖励差分，从理论上缓解了稀疏奖励下退化的双向模拟度量的表示崩溃问题。基于这个鲁棒的度量，我们设计了基于势函数的探索奖励，它测量了潜在空间中相邻观察的相对新颖性。在MetaWorld和Maze2D上的大量实验表明，TEB实现了卓越的探索能力，并且优于最近的基线。

title: Debug2Fix: Supercharging Coding Agents with Interactive Debugging Capabilities
summary: While significant progress has been made in automating various aspects of software development through coding agents, there is still significant room for improvement in their bug fixing capabilities. Debugging and investigation of runtime behavior remains largely a manual, developer-driven process. Popular coding agents typically rely on either static analysis of the code or iterative test-fix cycles, which is akin to trial and error debugging. We posit that there is a wealth of rich runtime information that developers routinely access while debugging code, which agents are currently deprived of due to design limitations. Despite how prevalent debuggers are in modern IDEs and command-line tools, they have surprisingly not made their way into coding agents. In this work, we introduce Debug2Fix, a novel framework that incorporates interactive debugging as a core component of a software engineering agent via a subagent architecture. We incorporate debuggers for Java and Python into our agent framework and evaluate against GitBug-Java and SWE-Bench-Live and achieve >20% improvement in performance compared to the baseline for certain models. Furthermore, using our framework, we're able to make weaker models like GPT-5 and Claude Haiku 4.5 match or exceed the performances of stronger models like Claude Sonnet 4.5, showing that better tool design is often just as important as switching to a more expensive model. Finally, we conduct systematic ablations demonstrating the importance of both the subagent architecture and debugger integration.
tldr: The paper introduces Debug2Fix, a framework that integrates interactive debugging capabilities into coding agents for improved bug fixing, demonstrating significant performance gains and highlighting the importance of tool design over model size.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Debug2Fix，一个将交互式调试功能集成到编码代理中的框架，以改进错误修复，展示了显著的性能提升，并强调了工具设计比模型大小更重要。
summary_zh: 尽管通过编码代理自动化软件开发的各个方面已经取得了显著进展，但在其错误修复能力方面仍有很大的改进空间。运行时行为的调试和调查仍然主要是一个手动、由开发者驱动的过程。流行的编码代理通常依赖于代码的静态分析或迭代测试-修复循环，这类似于试错调试。我们认为，开发者在调试代码时会常规访问大量的丰富运行时信息，而由于设计上的限制，代理目前缺乏这些信息。尽管调试器在现代IDE和命令行工具中非常普遍，但令人惊讶的是，它们还没有被引入到编码代理中。在这项工作中，我们 introducing Debug2Fix，这是一个新颖的框架，它通过子代理架构将交互式调试作为软件工程代理的核心组件。我们将Java和Python的调试器整合到我们的代理框架中，并在GitBug-Java和SWE-Bench-Live上进行评估，对于某些模型，与基线相比，性能提高了20%以上。此外，使用我们的框架，我们可以使像GPT-5和Claude Haiku 4.5这样的较弱模型达到甚至超过像Claude Sonnet 4.5这样的较强模型的性能，这表明更好的工具设计通常与切换到更昂贵的模型一样重要。最后，我们进行了系统的消融实验，证明了子代理架构和调试器集成的重要性。

title: Going Down Memory Lane: Scaling Tokens for Video Stream Understanding with Dynamic KV-Cache Memory
summary: Streaming video understanding requires models to robustly encode, store, and retrieve information from a continuous video stream to support accurate video question answering (VQA). Existing state-of-the-art approaches rely on key-value caching to accumulate frame-level information over time, but use a limited number of tokens per frame, leading to the loss of fine-grained visual details. In this work, we propose scaling the token budget to enable more granular spatiotemporal understanding and reasoning. First, we find that current methods are ill-equipped to handle dense streams: their feature encoding causes query-frame similarity scores to increase over time, biasing retrieval toward later frames. To address this, we introduce an adaptive selection strategy that reduces token redundancy while preserving local spatiotemporal information. We further propose a training-free retrieval mixture-of-experts that leverages external models to better identify relevant frames. Our method, MemStream, achieves +8.0% on CG-Bench, +8.5% on LVBench, and +2.4% on VideoMME (Long) over ReKV with Qwen2.5-VL-7B.
tldr: The paper introduces MemStream, a method to improve video stream understanding by scaling token budgets in key-value caching, addressing redundancy and biased retrieval, achieving significant improvements on VQA benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了MemStream，一种通过缩放键值缓存中的token预算来改进视频流理解的方法，解决了冗余和有偏差的检索问题，并在VQA基准测试中取得了显著改进。
summary_zh: 流式视频理解需要模型能够稳健地编码、存储并检索来自连续视频流的信息，以支持精确的视频问答(VQA)。现有最先进的方法依赖于键-值缓存来随时间积累帧级别的信息，但每帧仅使用有限数量的token，导致精细的视觉细节丢失。在这项工作中，我们提出扩展token预算，以实现更精细的时空理解和推理。首先，我们发现当前方法难以处理密集流：它们的特征编码导致查询帧相似度得分随时间增加，从而使检索偏向于后续帧。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种自适应选择策略，该策略减少了token冗余，同时保留了局部时空信息。我们进一步提出了一种无需训练的检索混合专家模型，该模型利用外部模型来更好地识别相关帧。我们的方法MemStream，在使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型的情况下，在CG-Bench上实现了+8.0%，在LVBench上实现了+8.5%，在VideoMME (Long) 上实现了+2.4%的性能提升，相对于ReKV。

title: Issues with Measuring Task Complexity via Random Policies in Robotic Tasks
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has enabled major advances in fields such as robotics and natural language processing. A key challenge in RL is measuring task complexity, which is essential for creating meaningful benchmarks and designing effective curricula. While there are numerous well-established metrics for assessing task complexity in tabular settings, relatively few exist in non-tabular domains. These include (i) Statistical analysis of the performance of random policies via Random Weight Guessing (RWG), and (ii) information-theoretic metrics Policy Information Capacity (PIC) and Policy-Optimal Information Capacity (POIC), which are reliant on RWG. In this paper, we evaluate these methods using progressively difficult robotic manipulation setups, with known relative complexity, with both dense and sparse reward formulations. Our empirical results reveal that measuring complexity is still nuanced. Specifically, under the same reward formulation, PIC suggests that a two-link robotic arm setup is easier than a single-link setup - which contradicts the robotic control and empirical RL perspective whereby the two-link setup is inherently more complex. Likewise, for the same setup, POIC estimates that tasks with sparse rewards are easier than those with dense rewards. Thus, we show that both PIC and POIC contradict typical understanding and empirical results from RL. These findings highlight the need to move beyond RWG-based metrics towards better metrics that can more reliably capture task complexity in non-tabular RL with our task framework as a starting point.
tldr: This paper evaluates existing metrics for measuring task complexity in non-tabular RL for robotics, specifically Random Weight Guessing (RWG), Policy Information Capacity (PIC), and Policy-Optimal Information Capacity (POIC). It finds that these metrics contradict established knowledge and empirical results in robotics, highlighting the need for better complexity metrics.
tldr_zh: 本文评估了用于衡量机器人非表格强化学习中任务复杂度的现有指标，特别是随机权重猜测 (RWG)、策略信息容量 (PIC) 和策略最优信息容量 (POIC)。研究发现这些指标与机器人领域已知的知识和经验结果相矛盾，突出了对更好的复杂度指标的需求。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）已经在机器人技术和自然语言处理等领域取得了重大进展。RL中的一个关键挑战是衡量任务复杂度，这对于创建有意义的基准和设计有效的课程至关重要。虽然在表格型设置中评估任务复杂度的指标有很多已成熟的方法，但在非表格型领域却相对较少。这些方法包括：（i）通过随机权重猜测（RWG）对随机策略的性能进行统计分析；以及（ii）信息论度量策略信息容量（PIC）和策略最优信息容量（POIC），它们依赖于RWG。在本文中，我们使用逐渐增加难度的机器人操作设置（具有已知的相对复杂度），并结合密集和稀疏奖励机制来评估这些方法。我们的实证结果表明，衡量复杂度仍然很微妙。具体而言，在相同的奖励机制下，PIC表明双连杆机械臂设置比单连杆设置更容易——但这与机器人控制和经验性RL的观点相矛盾，后者认为双连杆设置本质上更复杂。同样，对于相同的设置，POIC估计具有稀疏奖励的任务比具有密集奖励的任务更容易。因此，我们表明PIC和POIC都与典型的理解和RL的实证结果相矛盾。这些发现突出了我们需要摆脱基于RWG的指标，转而采用更好的指标，以便更可靠地捕获非表格型RL中的任务复杂度，而我们的任务框架可以作为一个起点。

title: Learning Beyond Optimization: Stress-Gated Dynamical Regime Regulation in Autonomous Systems
summary: Despite their apparent diversity, modern machine learning methods can be reduced to a remarkably simple core principle: learning is achieved by continuously optimizing parameters to minimize or maximize a scalar objective function. This paradigm has been extraordinarily successful for well-defined tasks where goals are fixed and evaluation criteria are explicit. However, if artificial systems are to move toward true autonomy-operating over long horizons and across evolving contexts-objectives may become ill-defined, shifting, or entirely absent. In such settings, a fundamental question emerges: in the absence of an explicit objective function, how can a system determine whether its ongoing internal dynamics are productive or pathological? And how should it regulate structural change without external supervision? In this work, we propose a dynamical framework for learning without an explicit objective. Instead of minimizing external error signals, the system evaluates the intrinsic health of its own internal dynamics and regulates structural plasticity accordingly. We introduce a two-timescale architecture that separates fast state evolution from slow structural adaptation, coupled through an internally generated stress variable that accumulates evidence of persistent dynamical dysfunction. Structural modification is then triggered not continuously, but as a state-dependent event. Through a minimal toy model, we demonstrate that this stress-regulated mechanism produces temporally segmented, self-organized learning episodes without reliance on externally defined goals. Our results suggest a possible route toward autonomous learning systems capable of self-assessment and internally regulated structural reorganization.
tldr: The paper proposes a novel dynamical framework for autonomous learning systems that learn without an explicit objective function by evaluating intrinsic health and regulating structural plasticity based on an internally generated stress variable.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于自主学习系统的新型动态框架，该框架无需显式目标函数即可学习，通过评估内在健康状况并基于内部生成的应力变量来调节结构可塑性。
summary_zh: 尽管现代机器学习方法看似多样，但它们可以归结为一个非常简单的核心原则：学习是通过不断优化参数来最小化或最大化一个标量目标函数来实现的。对于目标固定且评估标准明确的定义良好的任务，这种范式已经取得了非凡的成功。然而，如果人工智能系统要朝着真正的自主化发展——在漫长的周期内和不断变化的环境中运行——目标可能会变得定义不清、不断变化，甚至完全缺失。在这种情况下，出现了一个根本性的问题：在没有明确目标函数的情况下，系统如何确定其持续的内部动态是有成效的还是病态的？又该如何在没有外部监督的情况下调节结构性变化？在这项工作中，我们提出了一个无需明确目标函数的动态学习框架。系统不再是最小化外部误差信号，而是评估自身内部动态的内在健康状况，并相应地调节结构可塑性。我们引入了一个双时间尺度架构，将快速状态演化与缓慢的结构适应相分离，并通过内部产生的压力变量来耦合，该变量累积了持续动态功能障碍的证据。结构修饰不是连续触发的，而是作为一种状态相关的事件。通过一个最小的玩具模型，我们证明了这种压力调节机制产生了时间分割的、自组织的学习片段，且不依赖于外部定义的目标。我们的结果表明，这可能是一条通往自主学习系统的途径，这些系统能够进行自我评估和内部调节的结构重组。

title: When the Inference Meets the Explicitness or Why Multimodality Can Make Us Forget About the Perfect Predictor
summary: Although in the literature it is common to find predictors and inference systems that try to predict human intentions, the uncertainty of these models due to the randomness of human behavior has led some authors to start advocating the use of communication systems that explicitly elicit human intention. In this work, it is analyzed the use of four different communication systems with a human-robot collaborative object transportation task as experimental testbed: two intention predictors (one based on force prediction and another with an enhanced velocity prediction algorithm) and two explicit communication methods (a button interface and a voice-command recognition system). These systems were integrated into IVO, a custom mobile social robot equipped with force sensor to detect the force exchange between both agents and LiDAR to detect the environment. The collaborative task required transporting an object over a 5-7 meter distance with obstacles in the middle, demanding rapid decisions and precise physical coordination. 75 volunteers perform a total of 255 executions divided into three groups, testing inference systems in the first round, communication systems in the second, and the combined strategies in the third. The results show that, 1) once sufficient performance is achieved, the human no longer notices and positively assesses technical improvements; 2) the human prefers systems that are more natural to them even though they have higher failure rates; and 3) the preferred option is the right combination of both systems.
tldr: This paper compares intention prediction versus explicit communication methods in a human-robot collaborative object transportation task, finding that a combination of both approaches is preferred, and users value natural interfaces more than perfect predictors.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了人机协作物体运输任务中意图预测与显式通信方法，发现两者的结合更受欢迎，并且用户更看重自然界面而非完美的预测模型。
summary_zh: 尽管文献中常见预测器和推理系统试图预测人类意图，但由于人类行为的随机性导致这些模型存在不确定性，一些作者开始提倡使用明确引出人类意图的通信系统。在这项工作中，我们分析了四种不同通信系统在人机协作对象运输任务中的应用，并将其作为实验平台：两种意图预测器（一种基于力预测，另一种基于增强的velocity预测算法）和两种显式通信方法（按钮界面和语音命令识别系统）。这些系统被集成到IVO中，这是一个定制的移动社交机器人，配备力传感器以检测两个智能体之间的力交换，并配备激光雷达以检测环境。协作任务要求在5-7米的距离内运输一个有障碍物的物体，这需要快速决策和精确的物理协调。75名志愿者总共进行了255次执行，分为三组，第一轮测试推理系统，第二轮测试通信系统，第三轮测试组合策略。结果表明，1）一旦达到足够的性能，人类就不再注意到技术改进并对其进行积极评估；2）人类更喜欢对他们来说更自然的系统，即使这些系统具有更高的故障率；3）首选方案是两种系统的正确组合。

title: GRAB: A Systematic Real-World Grasping Benchmark for Robotic Food Waste Sorting
summary: Food waste management is critical for sustainability, yet inorganic contaminants hinder recycling potential. Robotic automation presents a compelling approach to this challenge by accelerating the sorting process through automated contaminant removal. Still, the diverse and unpredictable nature of contaminants creates major challenges for robotic grasping. Benchmarking frameworks are critical for evaluating challenges from various perspectives. However, existing protocols rely on limited simulation datasets, prioritise simple metrics such as success rate, and overlook key object and environment-related pre-grasp conditions. This paper introduces GRAB, a comprehensive Grasping Real-World Article Benchmarking framework that addresses this gap by integrating diverse deformable objects, advanced grasp-pose-estimation vision, and, importantly, pre-grasp conditions, establishing a set of critical graspability metrics. It systematically compares industrial grasping modalities through an in-depth experimental evaluation involving 1,750 food contaminant grasp attempts across four high-fidelity scenes. This large-scale evaluation provides an extensive assessment of grasp performance for food waste sorting, offering a level of depth that has rarely been explored in previous studies. The results reveal distinct gripper strengths and limitations, with object quality emerging as the dominant performance factor in cluttered environments, while vision quality and clutter levels play moderate roles. These findings highlight essential design considerations and reinforce the necessity of developing multimodal gripper technologies capable of robust cross-category performance for effective robotic food waste sorting.
tldr: The paper introduces GRAB, a new real-world grasping benchmark for robotic food waste sorting, featuring diverse objects, advanced vision, and pre-grasp conditions to evaluate industrial grippers.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GRAB，一个新的用于机器人食物垃圾分类的真实世界抓取基准，具有多样化的物体、先进的视觉和抓取前条件，用于评估工业夹持器。
summary_zh: 食物垃圾管理对于可持续性至关重要，然而无机污染物阻碍了其回收的潜力。机器人自动化提供了一种引人注目的解决方案，通过自动去除污染物来加速分拣过程。然而，污染物种类繁多且不可预测的特性给机器人抓取带来了重大挑战。基准测试框架对于评估来自不同角度的挑战至关重要。然而，现有的协议依赖于有限的仿真数据集，优先考虑诸如成功率之类的简单指标，并忽略了与目标物体和环境相关的关键预抓取条件。本文推出GRAB，一个全面的抓取真实世界物品基准测试框架，通过整合多样化的可变形物体、先进的抓取姿态估计视觉技术，以及更重要的是预抓取条件来弥补这一差距，建立了一套关键的可抓取性指标。它通过一项深入的实验评估，系统地比较了工业抓取方式，实验包含在四个高保真场景中进行的1750次食物污染物抓取尝试。这项大规模评估为食物垃圾分拣提供了一个对抓取性能的广泛评估，提供了以往研究中罕有探索的深度。结果揭示了不同夹具的优势和局限性，物体质量成为杂乱环境中主要的性能影响因素，而视觉质量和杂乱程度起着中等程度的作用。这些发现强调了基本的设计考虑因素，并强化了开发能够在跨类别表现出稳健性能的多模态夹具技术的必要性，从而实现有效的机器人食物垃圾分拣。

title: Enhancing Goal Inference via Correction Timing
summary: Corrections offer a natural modality for people to provide feedback to a robot, by (i) intervening in the robot's behavior when they believe the robot is failing (or will fail) the task objectives and (ii) modifying the robot's behavior to successfully fulfill the task. Each correction offers information on what the robot should and should not do, where the corrected behavior is more aligned with task objectives than the original behavior. Most prior work on learning from corrections involves interpreting a correction as a new demonstration (consisting of the modified robot behavior), or a preference (for the modified trajectory compared to the robot's original behavior). However, this overlooks one essential element of the correction feedback, which is the human's decision to intervene in the robot's behavior in the first place. This decision can be influenced by multiple factors including the robot's task progress, alignment with human expectations, dynamics, motion legibility, and optimality. In this work, we investigate whether the timing of this decision can offer a useful signal for inferring these task-relevant influences. In particular, we investigate three potential applications for this learning signal: (1) identifying features of a robot's motion that may prompt people to correct it, (2) quickly inferring the final goal of a human's correction based on the timing and initial direction of their correction motion, and (3) learning more precise constraints for task objectives. Our results indicate that correction timing results in improved learning for the first two of these applications. Overall, our work provides new insights on the value of correction timing as a signal for robot learning.
tldr: This paper explores the utility of correction timing as a signal for improving robot learning through goal inference and motion feature identification, demonstrating some improvements in these areas.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了校正时序作为一种信号，通过目标推断和动作特征识别来改进机器人学习的效用，并展示了在这些领域的一些改进。
summary_zh: 更正为人们提供了一种自然的模式来向机器人提供反馈，通过（i）当他们认为机器人未能达到（或将未能达到）任务目标时，干预机器人的行为，以及（ii）修改机器人的行为以成功完成任务。每次更正都提供了关于机器人应该做什么和不应该做什么的信息，其中更正后的行为比原始行为更符合任务目标。以往关于从更正中学习的大部分工作都将更正解释为新的演示（由修改后的机器人行为组成），或者是一种偏好（相对于机器人的原始行为，更偏向修改后的轨迹）。然而，这忽略了更正反馈的一个基本要素，即人类首先决定干预机器人行为的决策。该决策可能受到多种因素的影响，包括机器人的任务进度、与人类期望的对齐、动力学、运动可读性和最优性。在这项工作中，我们研究了该决策的时机是否可以为推断这些与任务相关的因素提供有用的信号。特别是，我们研究了这种学习信号的三个潜在应用：（1）识别机器人运动中可能促使人们对其进行更正的特征，（2）基于更正动作的时机和初始方向快速推断人类更正的最终目标，以及（3）学习更精确的任务目标约束。我们的结果表明，更正时机改善了前两个应用的学习效果。总而言之，我们的研究为更正时机作为机器人学习信号的价值提供了新的见解。

title: HONEST-CAV: Hierarchical Optimization of Network Signals and Trajectories for Connected and Automated Vehicles with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: This study presents a hierarchical, network-level traffic flow control framework for mixed traffic consisting of Human-driven Vehicles (HVs), Connected and Automated Vehicles (CAVs). The framework jointly optimizes vehicle-level eco-driving behaviors and intersection-level traffic signal control to enhance overall network efficiency and decrease energy consumption. A decentralized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) approach by Value Decomposition Network (VDN) manages cycle-based traffic signal control (TSC) at intersections, while an innovative Signal Phase and Timing (SPaT) prediction method integrates a Machine Learning-based Trajectory Planning Algorithm (MLTPA) to guide CAVs in executing Eco-Approach and Departure (EAD) maneuvers. The framework is evaluated across varying CAV proportions and powertrain types to assess its effects on mobility and energy performance. Experimental results conducted in a 4*4 real-world network demonstrate that the MARL-based TSC method outperforms the baseline model (i.e., Webster method) in speed, fuel consumption, and idling time. In addition, with MLTPA, HONEST-CAV benefits the traffic system further in energy consumption and idling time. With a 60% CAV proportion, vehicle average speed, fuel consumption, and idling time can be improved/saved by 7.67%, 10.23%, and 45.83% compared with the baseline. Furthermore, discussions on CAV proportions and powertrain types are conducted to quantify the performance of the proposed method with the impact of automation and electrification.
tldr: This paper proposes a hierarchical MARL framework (HONEST-CAV) for traffic flow control, jointly optimizing traffic signals and CAV eco-driving, showing significant improvements in speed, fuel consumption, and idling time in simulated mixed traffic scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个分层MARL框架(HONEST-CAV)用于交通流控制，联合优化交通信号和CAV的生态驾驶，在模拟的混合交通场景中，速度、燃油消耗和怠速时间都有显著的改善。
summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种分层的、网络层面的混合交通流控制框架，该框架由人类驾驶车辆（HVs）、互联自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）组成。该框架联合优化车辆层面的生态驾驶行为和路口层面的交通信号控制，以提高整体网络效率并降低能源消耗。一种基于价值分解网络（VDN）的分布式多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法管理路口基于周期的交通信号控制（TSC），同时，一种创新的信号相位和配时（SPaT）预测方法集成了一种基于机器学习的轨迹规划算法（MLTPA），以指导CAV执行生态接近和驶离（EAD）操作。该框架在不同的CAV比例和动力总成类型下进行评估，以评估其对移动性和能源性能的影响。在一个4*4真实世界网络中进行的实验结果表明，基于MARL的TSC方法在速度、燃料消耗和怠速时间方面优于基准模型（即韦伯斯特方法）。此外，借助MLTPA，HONEST-CAV进一步提升了交通系统的能源消耗和怠速时间性能。在60%的CAV比例下，车辆平均速度、燃料消耗和怠速时间与基准相比分别提高了7.67%、节省了10.23%和45.83%。此外，还对CAV比例和动力总成类型进行了讨论，以量化所提出的方法在自动化和电气化影响下的性能。

title: PhysConvex: Physics-Informed 3D Dynamic Convex Radiance Fields for Reconstruction and Simulation
summary: Reconstructing and simulating dynamic 3D scenes with both visual realism and physical consistency remains a fundamental challenge. Existing neural representations, such as NeRFs and 3DGS, excel in appearance reconstruction but struggle to capture complex material deformation and dynamics. We propose PhysConvex, a Physics-informed 3D Dynamic Convex Radiance Field that unifies visual rendering and physical simulation. PhysConvex represents deformable radiance fields using physically grounded convex primitives governed by continuum mechanics. We introduce a boundary-driven dynamic convex representation that models deformation through vertex and surface dynamics, capturing spatially adaptive, non-uniform deformation, and evolving boundaries. To efficiently simulate complex geometries and heterogeneous materials, we further develop a reduced-order convex simulation that advects dynamic convex fields using neural skinning eigenmodes as shape- and material-aware deformation bases with time-varying reduced DOFs under Newtonian dynamics. Convex dynamics also offers compact, gap-free volumetric coverage, enhancing both geometric efficiency and simulation fidelity. Experiments demonstrate that PhysConvex achieves high-fidelity reconstruction of geometry, appearance, and physical properties from videos, outperforming existing methods.
tldr: PhysConvex introduces a physics-informed 3D Dynamic Convex Radiance Field for reconstructing and simulating dynamic 3D scenes, combining visual realism with physically consistent dynamics using convex primitives and reduced-order simulation.
tldr_zh: PhysConvex 提出了一种物理信息驱动的 3D 动态凸辐射场，用于重建和模拟动态 3D 场景，将视觉真实感与物理一致性动力学相结合，使用凸基元和降阶模拟。
summary_zh: 重建和模拟具有视觉真实感和物理一致性的动态3D场景仍然是一项根本性的挑战。现有的神经表示，例如NeRFs和3DGS，在外观重建方面表现出色，但在捕捉复杂的材料形变和动力学方面却步履维艰。我们提出了PhysConvex，一种物理信息驱动的3D动态凸辐射场，它统一了视觉渲染和物理仿真。PhysConvex使用基于物理基础的凸基元表示可变形的辐射场，这些基元受连续介质力学支配。我们引入了一种边界驱动的动态凸表示，通过顶点和表面动力学来建模形变，从而捕捉空间自适应、非均匀形变和演化的边界。为了高效地模拟复杂的几何体和异质材料，我们进一步开发了一种降阶凸模拟，它使用神经蒙皮特征模态作为形状和材料感知的形变基，在牛顿动力学下，以随时间变化的降阶自由度来平流动态凸场。凸动力学还提供紧凑、无间隙的体积覆盖，从而增强了几何效率和仿真保真度。实验表明，PhysConvex实现了从视频中对几何体、外观和物理属性的高保真重建，优于现有方法。

title: SARAH: Spatially Aware Real-time Agentic Humans
summary: As embodied agents become central to VR, telepresence, and digital human applications, their motion must go beyond speech-aligned gestures: agents should turn toward users, respond to their movement, and maintain natural gaze. Current methods lack this spatial awareness. We close this gap with the first real-time, fully causal method for spatially-aware conversational motion, deployable on a streaming VR headset. Given a user's position and dyadic audio, our approach produces full-body motion that aligns gestures with speech while orienting the agent according to the user. Our architecture combines a causal transformer-based VAE with interleaved latent tokens for streaming inference and a flow matching model conditioned on user trajectory and audio. To support varying gaze preferences, we introduce a gaze scoring mechanism with classifier-free guidance to decouple learning from control: the model captures natural spatial alignment from data, while users can adjust eye contact intensity at inference time. On the Embody 3D dataset, our method achieves state-of-the-art motion quality at over 300 FPS -- 3x faster than non-causal baselines -- while capturing the subtle spatial dynamics of natural conversation. We validate our approach on a live VR system, bringing spatially-aware conversational agents to real-time deployment. Please see https://evonneng.github.io/sarah/ for details.
tldr: The paper introduces SARAH, a real-time, causal method for generating spatially-aware conversational human motion in VR, using a transformer-based VAE and flow matching, achieving state-of-the-art motion quality at high FPS.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了SARAH，一种用于在VR中生成空间感知对话人类运动的实时因果方法，它使用基于transformer的VAE和流匹配，以高FPS实现了最先进的运动质量。
summary_zh: 随着具身智能体在VR、远程呈现和数字人应用中变得日益重要，它们的动作必须超越与语音对齐的手势：智能体应该转向用户，响应用户的移动，并保持自然的目光注视。当前的方法缺乏这种空间感知能力。我们通过首个实时、完全因果的空间感知对话动作生成方法来弥补这一差距，该方法可部署在流式VR头显上。给定用户的位置和双声道音频，我们的方法生成与语音对齐手势并根据用户定位智能体的全身动作。我们的架构结合了一个基于因果Transformer的VAE，其中交织了潜在令牌用于流式推理，以及一个以用户轨迹和音频为条件的流匹配模型。为了支持不同的凝视偏好，我们引入了一种带有无分类器引导的凝视评分机制，以将学习与控制分离：该模型从数据中捕获自然的spatial alignment，而用户可以在推理时调整眼神交流强度。在Embody 3D数据集上，我们的方法以超过300 FPS的速度实现了最先进的运动质量——比非因果基线快3倍——同时捕捉了自然对话中微妙的空间动态。我们通过一个实时VR系统验证了我们的方法，将空间感知对话智能体带到了实时部署中。详情请参见 https://evonneng.github.io/sarah/。

title: Robotic Fruits with Tunable Stiffness and Sensing: Towards a Methodology for Developing Realistic Physical Twins of Fruits
summary: The global agri-food sector faces increasing challenges from labour shortages, high consumer demand, and supply-chain disruptions, resulting in substantial losses of unharvested produce. Robotic harvesting has emerged as a promising alternative; however, evaluating and training soft grippers for delicate fruits remains difficult due to the highly variable mechanical properties of natural produce. This makes it difficult to establish reliable benchmarks or data-driven control strategies. Existing testing practices rely on large quantities of real fruit to capture this variability, leading to inefficiency, higher costs, and waste. The methodology presented in this work aims to address these limitations by developing tunable soft physical twins that emulate the stiffness characteristics of real fruits at different ripeness levels. A fiber-reinforced pneumatic physical twin of a kiwi fruit was designed and fabricated to replicate the stiffness at different ripeness levels. Experimental results show that the stiffness of the physical twin can be tuned accurately over multiple trials (97.35 - 99.43% accuracy). Gripping tasks with a commercial robotic gripper showed that sensor feedback from the physical twin can reflect the applied gripping forces. Finally, a stress test was performed over 50 cycles showed reliable maintenance of desired stiffness (0.56 - 1.10% error). This work shows promise that robotic physical twins could adjust their stiffness to resemble that of real fruits. This can provide a sustainable, controllable platform for benchmarking and training robotic grippers.
tldr: This paper introduces a method for creating robotic "fruits" with tunable stiffness to serve as physical twins for training and benchmarking robotic grippers in the agri-food sector, offering a sustainable alternative to using real produce.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种创建具有可调刚度的机器人“水果”的方法，作为物理孪生体，用于在农业食品领域训练和评估机器人夹具，为使用真正的农产品提供了一种可持续的替代方案。
summary_zh: 全球农业食品行业正面临着劳动力短缺、消费者需求旺盛和供应链中断等日益严峻的挑战，导致大量农产品滞留未收，损失惨重。机器人采摘已成为一种有前景的替代方案；然而，由于天然农产品高度可变的机械特性，评估和训练用于采摘易损水果的柔性夹爪仍然困难。这使得建立可靠的基准或数据驱动的控制策略变得困难。现有的测试方法依赖于大量的真实水果来捕捉这种可变性，导致效率低下、成本较高和浪费。本工作提出的方法旨在通过开发可调软物理孪生体来模拟不同成熟度水平的真实水果的刚度特性，从而解决这些限制。设计并制造了一种猕猴桃的纤维增强气动物理孪生体，以复制不同成熟度水平的刚度。实验结果表明，该物理孪生体的刚度可以在多次试验中精确地调整（97.35 - 99.43% 的准确率）。使用商业机器人夹爪进行的抓取任务表明，来自物理孪生体的传感器反馈可以反映施加的抓取力。最后，在 50 个循环中进行的压力测试表明，能够可靠地维持所需的刚度（0.56 - 1.10% 的误差）。这项工作显示出机器人物理孪生体有望调整其刚度以模拟真实水果的刚度。这可以为机器人夹爪的基准测试和训练提供一个可持续的、可控的平台。

title: Enhancing 3D LiDAR Segmentation by Shaping Dense and Accurate 2D Semantic Predictions
summary: Semantic segmentation of 3D LiDAR point clouds is important in urban remote sensing for understanding real-world street environments. This task, by projecting LiDAR point clouds and 3D semantic labels as sparse maps, can be reformulated as a 2D problem. However, the intrinsic sparsity of the projected LiDAR and label maps can result in sparse and inaccurate intermediate 2D semantic predictions, which in return limits the final 3D accuracy. To address this issue, we enhance this task by shaping dense and accurate 2D predictions. Specifically, we develop a multi-modal segmentation model, MM2D3D. By leveraging camera images as auxiliary data, we introduce cross-modal guided filtering to overcome label map sparsity by constraining intermediate 2D semantic predictions with dense semantic relations derived from the camera images; and we introduce dynamic cross pseudo supervision to overcome LiDAR map sparsity by encouraging the 2D predictions to emulate the dense distribution of the semantic predictions from the camera images. Experiments show that our techniques enable our model to achieve intermediate 2D semantic predictions with dense distribution and higher accuracy, which effectively enhances the final 3D accuracy. Comparisons with previous methods demonstrate our superior performance in both 2D and 3D spaces.
tldr: The paper introduces a multi-modal approach (MM2D3D) leveraging camera images to enhance 3D LiDAR segmentation by improving the density and accuracy of intermediate 2D semantic predictions, leading to better 3D accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种多模态方法(MM2D3D)，利用相机图像通过提高中间2D语义预测的密度和准确性来增强3D激光雷达分割，从而提高3D精度。
summary_zh: 三维激光雷达点云的语义分割在城市遥感中对于理解真实世界街道环境至关重要。该任务可以通过将激光雷达点云和三维语义标签投影为稀疏图，从而被重新表述为一个二维问题。然而，投影后的激光雷达图和标签图的内在稀疏性可能导致稀疏且不准确的中间二维语义预测，反过来又限制了最终的三维精度。为了解决这个问题，我们通过塑造密集且准确的二维预测来增强这项任务。具体来说，我们开发了一个多模态分割模型MM2D3D。通过利用相机图像作为辅助数据，我们引入了跨模态引导滤波，通过使用从相机图像中导出的密集语义关系来约束中间二维语义预测，从而克服标签图的稀疏性；并且我们引入了动态跨伪监督，通过鼓励二维预测模仿来自相机图像的语义预测的密集分布，从而克服激光雷达图的稀疏性。实验表明，我们的技术使我们的模型能够实现具有密集分布和更高准确度的中间二维语义预测，从而有效地提高了最终的三维精度。与先前方法的比较表明，我们在二维和三维空间中都表现出卓越的性能。

title: Online decoding of rat self-paced locomotion speed from EEG using recurrent neural networks
summary: $\textit{Objective.}$ Accurate neural decoding of locomotion holds promise for advancing rehabilitation, prosthetic control, and understanding neural correlates of action. Recent studies have demonstrated decoding of locomotion kinematics across species on motorized treadmills. However, efforts to decode locomotion speed in more natural contexts$-$where pace is self-selected rather than externally imposed$-$are scarce, generally achieve only modest accuracy, and require intracranial implants. Here, we aim to decode self-paced locomotion speed non-invasively and continuously using cortex-wide EEG recordings from rats. $\textit{Approach.}$ We introduce an asynchronous brain$-$computer interface (BCI) that processes a stream of 32-electrode skull-surface EEG (0.01$-$45 Hz) to decode instantaneous speed from a non-motorized treadmill during self-paced locomotion in head-fixed rats. Using recurrent neural networks and a dataset of over 133 h of recordings, we trained decoders to map ongoing EEG activity to treadmill speed. $\textit{Main results.}$ Our decoding achieves a correlation of 0.88 ($R^2$ = 0.78) for speed, primarily driven by visual cortex electrodes and low-frequency ($< 8$ Hz) oscillations. Moreover, pre-training on a single session permitted decoding on other sessions from the same rat, suggesting uniform neural signatures that generalize across sessions but fail to transfer across animals. Finally, we found that cortical states not only carry information about current speed, but also about future and past dynamics, extending up to 1000 ms. $\textit{Significance.}$ These findings demonstrate that self-paced locomotion speed can be decoded accurately and continuously from non-invasive, cortex-wide EEG. Our approach provides a framework for developing high-performing, non-invasive BCI systems and contributes to understanding distributed neural representations of action dynamics.
tldr: This paper presents a non-invasive method for decoding self-paced locomotion speed in rats from EEG data using recurrent neural networks, achieving a correlation of 0.88. The method shows promise for BCI development and understanding neural representations of action.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种非侵入式方法，利用循环神经网络从脑电数据中解码大鼠的自 paced 运动速度，相关系数达到 0.88。该方法有望用于脑机接口开发和理解行动的神经表征。
summary_zh: 目的：精确的运动神经解码有望推进康复、假肢控制以及理解动作的神经关联。最近的研究表明可以在电动跑步机上对跨物种的运动学进行解码。然而，在更自然的背景下（即速度由自主选择而非外部施加）解码运动速度的尝试很少，通常只能达到一般的准确度，并且需要颅内植入。本文旨在利用大鼠皮层范围的脑电（EEG）记录，无创且连续地解码自主步速运动速度。方法：我们引入了一种异步脑-机接口（BCI），该接口处理来自32电极颅骨表面脑电（0.01-45 Hz）的数据流，以解码头部固定的大鼠在非电动跑步机上自主步速运动期间的瞬时速度。利用循环神经网络和一个超过133小时的记录数据集，我们训练了解码器，将持续的脑电活动映射到跑步机速度。主要结果：我们的解码达到了0.88的速度相关性（R^2 = 0.78），主要由视觉皮层电极和低频（< 8 Hz）振荡驱动。此外，在单个会话上的预训练允许在来自同一大鼠的其他会话上进行解码，表明存在在会话之间泛化的统一的神经特征，但无法在动物之间转移。最后，我们发现皮层状态不仅携带关于当前速度的信息，还携带关于未来和过去动态的信息，最长可达1000毫秒。意义：这些发现表明可以从无创的全皮层脑电图中准确且连续地解码自主步速运动速度。我们的方法提供了一个用于开发高性能、非侵入性脑-机接口系统的框架，并有助于理解动作动力学的分布式神经表征。

title: Equivalence and Divergence of Bayesian Log-Odds and Dempster's Combination Rule for 2D Occupancy Grids
summary: We introduce a pignistic-transform-based methodology for fair comparison of Bayesian log-odds and Dempster's combination rule in occupancy grid mapping, matching per-observation decision probabilities to isolate the fusion rule from sensor parameterization. Under BetP matching across simulation, two real lidar datasets, and downstream path planning, Bayesian fusion is consistently favored (15/15 directional consistency, p = 3.1e-5) with small absolute differences (0.001-0.022). Under normalized plausibility matching, the direction reverses, confirming the result is matching-criterion-specific. The methodology is reusable for any future Bayesian/belief function comparison.
tldr: This paper compares Bayesian log-odds and Dempster's combination rule in occupancy grid mapping using a pignistic-transform-based methodology, finding that the preferred method depends on the matching criterion used.
tldr_zh: 本文使用了一种基于pignistic变换的方法，比较了贝叶斯对数几率和Dempster组合规则在栅格地图构建中的应用，发现最佳方法取决于所使用的匹配标准。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种基于pignistic变换的方法，用于在占据栅格地图中公平比较贝叶斯对数几率和Dempster组合规则，通过匹配每次观测的决策概率，将融合规则从传感器参数化中隔离出来。在跨模拟、两个真实激光雷达数据集和下游路径规划的BetP匹配下，贝叶斯融合始终更优（15/15的方向一致性，p = 3.1e-5），且绝对差异较小（0.001-0.022）。在归一化似真度匹配下，方向反转，证实了结果是匹配准则特定的。该方法可重复用于任何未来的贝叶斯/置信函数比较。

title: RotorSuite: A MATLAB/Simulink Toolbox for Tilt Multi-Rotor UAV Modeling
summary: In recent years, aerial platforms have evolved from passive flying sensors into versatile, contact-aware robotic systems, leading to rapid advances in platform design. Standard coplanar and collinear quadrotors have been complemented by modern tilted and tilting multi-rotor platforms with enhanced maneuverability. To properly analyze, control, and validate the performance of these emerging platforms, an accurate modeling step is required; however, this can be time-consuming, user-dependent and error-prone. To address this issue, we propose a MATLAB/Simulink toolbox for modeling and simulating the dynamics of a broad class of multi-rotor platforms through both an analytical and physics-based approaches. The toolbox, named RotorSuite, is provided with comprehensive documentation and example use cases, representing a valuable tool for didactic, research, and industrial development purposes.
tldr: The paper introduces RotorSuite, a MATLAB/Simulink toolbox for modeling and simulating tilted multi-rotor UAV dynamics, aiming to simplify the analysis, control, and validation processes for these platforms.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为RotorSuite的MATLAB/Simulink工具箱，用于建模和仿真倾斜多旋翼无人机的动力学，旨在简化这些平台的分析、控制和验证过程。
summary_zh: 近年来，空中平台已经从被动的飞行传感器演变为多功能的、具有接触感知能力的机器人系统，从而推动了平台设计的快速发展。标准的共面和共线四旋翼飞行器已被具有增强机动性的现代倾斜和倾转多旋翼平台所补充。为了正确地分析、控制和验证这些新兴平台的性能，需要一个精确的建模步骤；然而，这可能非常耗时，依赖于用户，并且容易出错。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个MATLAB/Simulink工具箱，用于通过解析和基于物理的方法建模和仿真各种类型的多旋翼平台的动力学。该工具箱名为 RotorSuite，提供全面的文档和示例用例，对于教学、研究和工业开发目的而言，它是一种有价值的工具。

title: Systematic Analysis of Coupling Effects on Closed-Loop and Open-Loop Performance in Aerial Continuum Manipulators
summary: This paper investigates two distinct approaches to the dynamic modeling of aerial continuum manipulators (ACMs): the decoupled and the coupled formulations. Both open-loop and closed-loop behaviors of a representative ACM are analyzed. The primary objective is to determine the conditions under which the decoupled model attains accuracy comparable to the coupled model while offering reduced computational cost under identical numerical conditions. The system dynamics are first derived using the Euler--Lagrange method under the piecewise constant curvature (PCC) assumption, with explicit treatment of the near-zero curvature singularity. A decoupled model is then obtained by neglecting the coupling terms in the ACM dynamics, enabling systematic evaluation of open-loop responses under diverse actuation profiles and external wrenches. To extend the analysis to closed-loop performance, a novel dynamics-based proportional-derivative sliding mode image-based visual servoing (DPD-SM-IBVS) controller is developed for regulating image feature errors in the presence of a moving target. The controller is implemented with both coupled and decoupled models, allowing a direct comparison of their effectiveness. The open-loop simulations reveal pronounced discrepancies between the two modeling approaches, particularly under varying torque inputs and continuum arm parameters. Conversely, the closed-loop experiments demonstrate that the decoupled model achieves tracking accuracy on par with the coupled model (within subpixel error) while incurring lower computational cost.
tldr: This paper compares coupled and decoupled dynamic models for aerial continuum manipulators (ACMs), showing that a decoupled model can achieve similar closed-loop tracking accuracy with lower computational cost than a coupled model using a novel DPD-SM-IBVS controller.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了空中连续体机械臂（ACM）的耦合和解耦动态模型，结果表明，使用一种新的 DPD-SM-IBVS 控制器，解耦模型能以较低的计算成本实现与耦合模型相似的闭环跟踪精度。
summary_zh: 本文研究了两种不同的空中连续体机械臂（ACMs）动态建模方法：解耦公式和耦合公式。分析了代表性 ACM 的开环和闭环行为。主要目的是确定在相同的数值条件下，解耦模型在提供更低计算成本的同时，达到与耦合模型相当精度的条件。首先，在分段常曲率（PCC）假设下，使用欧拉-拉格朗日法推导系统动力学，并明确处理近零曲率奇异性。然后，通过忽略 ACM 动力学中的耦合项得到一个解耦模型，从而能够在不同的驱动剖面和外部扳手作用下系统地评估开环响应。为了将分析扩展到闭环性能，开发了一种新型的基于动力学的比例-微分滑模图像式视觉伺服（DPD-SM-IBVS）控制器，用于在存在移动目标的情况下调节图像特征误差。该控制器分别使用耦合模型和解耦模型实现，从而可以直接比较它们的有效性。开环仿真揭示了两种建模方法之间的显著差异，特别是在不同的扭矩输入和连续体臂参数下。相反，闭环实验表明，解耦模型实现了与耦合模型相当的跟踪精度（在亚像素误差范围内），同时降低了计算成本。

title: Design and Biomechanical Evaluation of a Lightweight Low-Complexity Soft Bilateral Ankle Exoskeleton
summary: Many people could benefit from exoskeleton assistance during gait, for either medical or nonmedical purposes. But exoskeletons bring added mass and structure, which in turn require compensating for. In this work, we present a lightweight, low-complexity, soft bilateral ankle exoskeleton for plantarflexion assistance, with a shoe attachment design that can be mounted on top of any pair of shoes. Experimental tests show no significant difference in lower limb kinematics and kinetics when wearing the exoskeleton in zero-torque mode relative to not wearing an exoskeleton, showing that our device does not obstruct healthy gait, and proving it as a compliant and comfortable device, promising to provide effective assistance. Hence, a control system was developed, and additional tests are underway.
tldr: The paper presents a lightweight, low-complexity soft ankle exoskeleton for plantarflexion assistance, demonstrating minimal interference with normal gait and promising assistance with a developed control system.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种轻量级、低复杂度的软性踝关节外骨骼，用于跖屈辅助。实验表明，该设备对正常步态的影响很小，且有望通过开发的控制系统提供有效的辅助。
summary_zh: 许多人都能从步态过程中的外骨骼辅助中获益，无论是出于医疗目的还是非医疗目的。但外骨骼会增加质量和结构，反过来需要进行补偿。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种轻量级、低复杂度的软性双边踝关节外骨骼，用于足底屈曲辅助，其鞋附件设计可以安装在任何一双鞋子上。实验测试表明，与不穿戴外骨骼相比，在零扭矩模式下穿戴外骨骼时，下肢运动学和动力学没有显著差异，表明我们的设备不阻碍健康的步态，并证明其是一种顺应性和舒适的设备，有望提供有效的辅助。因此，我们开发了一个控制系统，额外的测试正在进行中。

title: Snapping Actuators with Asymmetric and Sequenced Motion
summary: Snapping instabilities in soft structures offer a powerful pathway to achieve rapid and energy-efficient actuation. In this study, an eccentric dome-shaped snapping actuator is developed to generate controllable asymmetric motion through geometry-induced instability. Finite element simulations and experiments reveal consistent asymmetric deformation and the corresponding pressure characteristics. By coupling four snapping actuators in a pneumatic network, a compact quadrupedal robot achieves coordinated wavelike locomotion using only a single pressure input. The robot exhibits frequency-dependent performance with a maximum speed of 72.78~mm/s at 7.5~Hz. These findings demonstrate the potential of asymmetric snapping mechanisms for physically controlled actuation and lay the groundwork for fully untethered and efficient soft robotic systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel soft robot actuator using snapping instabilities for asymmetric motion, demonstrating wavelike locomotion in a quadrupedal robot with a single pressure input, showcasing energy efficiency and potential for untethered systems.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型软体机器人执行器，该执行器利用快速不稳定性产生非对称运动，并通过单气压输入实现了四足机器人的波浪式运动，展示了其能源效率以及开发解耦系统的潜力。
summary_zh: 软结构中的屈曲失稳为实现快速且节能的驱动提供了一种强大的途径。本研究开发了一种偏心穹顶形屈曲驱动器，通过几何诱导的不稳定性产生可控的非对称运动。有限元模拟和实验揭示了一致的非对称变形和相应的压力特性。通过将四个屈曲驱动器耦合到一个气动网络中，一个紧凑的四足机器人仅使用单一压力输入即可实现协调的波浪式运动。该机器人表现出频率相关的性能，在 7.5 Hz 时达到 72.78 mm/s 的最大速度。这些发现证明了非对称屈曲机制在物理控制驱动方面的潜力，并为完全无线且高效的软体机器人系统奠定了基础。

title: Carbon-aware decentralized dynamic task offloading in MIMO-MEC networks via multi-agent reinforcement learning
summary: Massive internet of things microservices require integrating renewable energy harvesting into mobile edge computing (MEC) for sustainable eScience infrastructures. Spatiotemporal mismatches between stochastic task arrivals and intermittent green energy along with complex inter-user interference in multi-antenna (MIMO) uplinks complicate real-time resource management. Traditional centralized optimization and off-policy reinforcement learning struggle with scalability and signaling overhead in dense networks. This paper proposes CADDTO-PPO, a carbon-aware decentralized dynamic task offloading framework based on multi-agent proximal policy optimization. The multi-user MIMO-MEC system is modeled as a Decentralized Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (DEC-POMDP) to jointly minimize carbon emissions and buffer latency and energy wastage. A scalable architecture utilizes decentralized execution with parameter sharing (DEPS), which enables autonomous IoT agents to make fine-grained power control and offloading decisions based solely on local observations. Additionally, a carbon-first reward structure adaptively prioritizes green time slots for data transmission to decouple system throughput from grid-dependent carbon footprints. Finally, experimental results demonstrate CADDTO-PPO outperforms deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) and lyapunov-based baselines. The framework achieves the lowest carbon intensity and maintains near-zero packet overflow rates under extreme traffic loads. Architectural profiling validates the framework to demonstrate a constant $O(1)$ inference complexity and theoretical lightweight feasibility for future generation sustainable IoT deployments.
tldr: The paper introduces CADDTO-PPO, a multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for carbon-aware task offloading in MIMO-MEC networks, achieving low carbon intensity and near-zero packet overflow under heavy loads.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CADDTO-PPO，一个用于MIMO-MEC网络中碳感知任务卸载的多智能体强化学习框架，在高负载下实现了低碳强度和接近零的数据包溢出率。
summary_zh: 大规模物联网微服务需要将可再生能源采集集成到移动边缘计算(MEC)中，以构建可持续的eScience基础设施。随机任务到达和间歇性绿色能源在时空上的不匹配，以及多天线(MIMO)上行链路中复杂的用户间干扰，增加了实时资源管理的难度。传统的集中式优化和离线强化学习在密集网络中难以扩展，且信令开销巨大。本文提出一种基于多智能体近端策略优化(PPO)的碳感知去中心化动态任务卸载框架CADDTO-PPO。多用户MIMO-MEC系统被建模为去中心化部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程(DEC-POMDP)，以联合最小化碳排放、缓冲延迟和能量浪费。一种可扩展的架构利用了参数共享的去中心化执行(DEPS)，这使得自主物联网代理能够仅基于本地观测做出细粒度的功率控制和卸载决策。此外，一种“碳优先”奖励结构自适应地优先考虑绿色时隙进行数据传输，以将系统吞吐量与依赖于电网的碳足迹解耦。实验结果表明，CADDTO-PPO优于深度确定性策略梯度(DDPG)和基于Lyapunov的基线方法。该框架实现了最低的碳强度，并在极端流量负载下保持近零的数据包溢出率。架构分析验证了该框架具有恒定的$O(1)$推理复杂度，以及面向未来可持续物联网部署的理论轻量级可行性。

title: BloomNet: Exploring Single vs. Multiple Object Annotation for Flower Recognition Using YOLO Variants
summary: Precise localization and recognition of flowers are crucial for advancing automated agriculture, particularly in plant phenotyping, crop estimation, and yield monitoring. This paper benchmarks several YOLO architectures such as YOLOv5s, YOLOv8n/s/m, and YOLOv12n for flower object detection under two annotation regimes: single-image single-bounding box (SISBB) and single-image multiple-bounding box (SIMBB). The FloralSix dataset, comprising 2,816 high-resolution photos of six different flower species, is also introduced. It is annotated for both dense (clustered) and sparse (isolated) scenarios. The models were evaluated using Precision, Recall, and Mean Average Precision (mAP) at IoU thresholds of 0.5 (mAP@0.5) and 0.5-0.95 (mAP@0.5:0.95). In SISBB, YOLOv8m (SGD) achieved the best results with Precision 0.956, Recall 0.951, mAP@0.5 0.978, and mAP@0.5:0.95 0.865, illustrating strong accuracy in detecting isolated flowers. With mAP@0.5 0.934 and mAP@0.5:0.95 0.752, YOLOv12n (SGD) outperformed the more complicated SIMBB scenario, proving robustness in dense, multi-object detection. Results show how annotation density, IoU thresholds, and model size interact: recall-optimized models perform better in crowded environments, whereas precision-oriented models perform best in sparse scenarios. In both cases, the Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) optimizer consistently performed better than alternatives. These density-sensitive sensors are helpful for non-destructive crop analysis, growth tracking, robotic pollination, and stress evaluation.
tldr: This paper benchmarks YOLOv5, YOLOv8, and YOLOv12 for flower object detection with single and multiple bounding box annotations, introducing the FloralSix dataset and finding SGD optimizer performs consistently better.
tldr_zh: 本文对YOLOv5、YOLOv8和YOLOv12在花卉目标检测中进行了基准测试，使用了单框和多框注释，介绍了FloralSix数据集，并发现SGD优化器表现始终更好。
summary_zh: 花朵的精确定位和识别对于推进自动化农业至关重要，尤其是在植物表型分析、作物估算和产量监测方面。本文对几种YOLO架构（如YOLOv5s、YOLOv8n/s/m和YOLOv12n）在两种标注机制下（即单图单框(SISBB)和单图多框(SIMBB)）进行了花朵目标检测的基准测试。同时引入了FloralSix数据集，该数据集包含2,816张六种不同花卉的高分辨率照片，并针对密集（聚集）和稀疏（孤立）场景进行了标注。使用精确率（Precision）、召回率（Recall）和平均精度均值（mAP），在交并比（IoU）阈值为0.5 (mAP@0.5) 和 0.5-0.95 (mAP@0.5:0.95) 的情况下对模型进行了评估。在SISBB中，YOLOv8m (SGD) 取得最佳结果，其精确率为0.956，召回率为0.951，mAP@0.5为0.978，mAP@0.5:0.95为0.865，表明其在检测孤立花朵方面具有很高的准确性。在更复杂的SIMBB场景中，YOLOv12n (SGD) 以mAP@0.5为0.934和mAP@0.5:0.95为0.752的成绩优于其他模型，证明了其在密集、多目标检测中的鲁棒性。结果表明了标注密度、IoU阈值和模型大小之间的相互作用：召回率优化的模型在拥挤环境中表现更好，而精度导向的模型在稀疏场景中表现最佳。在这两种情况下，随机梯度下降（SGD）优化器始终优于其他替代方案。这些对密度敏感的传感器有助于非破坏性作物分析、生长追踪、机器人授粉和胁迫评估。
